seo.title: Able Assess for Your Care Setting | Segment 1-Pagers | Able Care
seo.description: Download 1-page segment overviews: home care, CCRCs, independent living, skilled nursing, and more.

blocks.headline: Able Assess for your care setting.
blocks.subtitle: Every care setting has unique falls prevention challenges. Each 1-pager shows how Able Assess fits your specific workflow, regulatory requirements, and operational priorities.
blocks.backgroundImageAlt: Therapist and patient laughing during a session

blocks.heading: Segment overviews
blocks.body:
PE-Backed Home Care

Scalable falls screening across your portfolio. Standardized protocols for every branch, corporate-level reporting, and HHVBP protection.

Independent Home Care

Quality differentiation for independent agencies. Demonstrate measurable outcomes, improve HHVBP performance, and stand out from competitors.

CCRCs and Life Plan Communities

Coordinated screening across all care levels. Track residents through transitions from independent living to assisted living to skilled nursing.

Independent Living

Early risk identification and proactive wellness programming. Objective screening that supports residents in maintaining their independence.

Assisted Living

Standardized risk assessment that supports state licensing compliance. Consistent documentation for regulatory inspections and family reporting.

Rental Retirement

Streamlined assessment with minimal operational burden. Quick screening that fits into existing wellness programs without additional staffing.

Skilled Nursing Facilities

Evidence-backed screening for CQC and HHVBP compliance. Objective data that supports clinical decision-making and regulatory documentation.

blocks.heading: Need a custom overview for your setting?
blocks.body: Our team can create a tailored overview for your specific care setting and operational requirements.
